{{Quote|We don't have time to evacuate the planet. Besides, we don't have enough spaceships to take everyone to safety.|Oleson, to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="TMM" />}}
'''Oleson''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. He was the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] of the [[New Academy for Space Pilots]], where he also operated as a [[Flight instructor/Legends|flight instructor]].

==Biography==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[General/Legends|General]] Oleson served on an [[Unidentified planet (New Academy for Space Pilots)|unidentified planet]] as the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] of the [[New Academy for Space Pilots]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> When [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] joined the [[Planetary Pioneers]] to train with them, Oleson was his favorite [[Flight instructor/Legends|flight instructor]] at the academy.<ref name="TMM" />

At some point, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] came to visit the academy and Skywalker told her about the work of the Planetary Pioneers. However, the tour was interrupted by an [[emergency siren]] and the two of them raced to the office of General Oleson. There, the general explained that a [[Unidentified maverick moon|small moon]] from a nearby [[Star system/Legends|system]] had been blasted out of its [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] and was on a collision course with the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] housing the academy. Oleson wanted to call an evacuation, but knew that they would be unable to evacuate everyone in time. Only Skywalker's brave effort to destroy the maverick [[Moon/Legends|moon]] with [[Zukonium ray]]s saved the planet and the academy.<ref name="TMM" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Maverick Moon]]'' {{1st}}
